title: Equitable Access to Reading Program (EARP) – 2024 Call for Proposals - Canada.ca
content:
## Equitable Access to Reading Program (EARP) – 2024 Call for Proposals
This funding opportunity aims to increase the production of alternate format reading materials for persons with print disabilities.
- national, regional, or local not-for-profits
- private sector (small for-profit organizations of 99 employees or less)
- organizations that are located and operate in Canada

## Information sessions
We will hold information sessions to give an overview of this application process. You can take part online or by teleconference.
If you want to attend, please register by May 21, 2024, at 3:00 p.m. EDT.
To register for an information session, please click on the corresponding link below:
- English information session on May 22, 2024, at 1:00 p.m. EDT. This session will be delivered with American Sign Language (ASL) Interpretation and closed captioning.
- French information session on May 23, 2024, at 1:00 p.m. EDT. This session will be delivered with Langue des signes québécoise (LSQ) interpretation and closed captioning.
If you need accommodations to attend the information session, please contact us at EDSC.PAEL-EARP.ESDC@servicecanada.gc.ca by May 17, 2024, at 3:00 p.m. EDT.

## Help and contact information
- What are grants and contributions?
- Enquiries will be answered between May 9, 2024, and June 17, 2024 at 3:00 p.m. EDT.
- Email: EDSC.PAEL-EARP.ESDC@servicecanada.gc.ca
- If you need help or accommodations for applying, please contact us by June 5, 2024 at 3:00 p.m. EDT.
- Email: EDSC.PAEL-EARP.ESDC@servicecanada.gc.ca

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
